about.title: About Me
description: I'm a DevOps and Cloud enthusiast with a strong foundation in Python development. My passion is building scalable, automated solutions for modern infrastructure and cloud-native applications. I specialize in CI/CD, cloud deployments, and automation using Python and industry-leading DevOps tools.

I thrive on solving real-world problems with cloud platforms, automation, and robust backend systems. My work is focused on delivering secure, efficient, and maintainable solutions for businesses and teams.
